## Goal

## Acceptance Checks

- [ ] Site or relevant validation passes.
- [ ] Public-facing claims are supported by current artifacts.
- [ ] No private student, school, employer, job-search, credential, or raw source data is included.
- [ ] Generated outputs, screenshots, reports, or dashboards are reviewed if included.

## Notes
